title: 1,000 AI agents, 0 LLM calls?
summary: A tutorial on optimizing AI agent architectures to run at scale with minimal LLM calls by combining deterministic logic with agent decision-making. It covers when to use LLMs versus deterministic algorithms, callback hooks to bypass model calls, and route planning using the Spine and Sprout algorithm, demonstrating 1,000 agents running with zero LLM invocations.
